---
title: "Chau Nguyen"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: mypic.png
  links: 
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: mailto:nguyench4u@gmail.com
  - icon: github
    href: https://github.com/nguyench4u
---

Welcome to my Quarto website.

## Skills
- Python
- R Programming
- C/C++
- Javascript/React
- CSS

## Education 
- University of Colorado Denver
- Major: Computer Science, BS
- Minor: Data Science
